title: Proxy Adventures
description: Modpack for me and my fellows on the ProxySMP Server
body:
This modpack is trying to provide a new twist to your survival gameplay, to have you explore more and go on adventures. Whilst it contains the typical mods, like Create and Farmers delight, there is also plenty of Fantasy and Magic mods.

A big focus was also on quality of life mods, to make the player experience as smooth as possible, that of course also includes tons of Optimizations mods, whilst not messing with the game mechanics.

Since this modpack is really about adventures and exploration it includes lots of world generation mods, like Tectonic, Terralith and a few more smaller ones.

This is best played with friends on a server.

-----

I've mainly created this modpack for my own modded SMP, but I've decided to share the pack on here, since there might be more people interested in it.
I'm not intending to keep the mods up to date forever, so always check wether the pack has updated recently, else you might be missing out on newer features of the mod.

Some sane controls and default options are included, so you don't have to spend 20 minutes getting the controls to work.
